reviews.author: Jaimin Upadhyaya
reviews.review_body: One of the best schools in India and the value system it has. It's teaching methods have been different and way ahead of its time while maintaining the traditions.  Perfect environment for overall development of a child

reviews.author: Pooja Sharma
reviews.review_body: Sardar Patel Vidyalaya is one of the higher education schools of Jaypee Group which has facilities ranging from computer labs to a well-equipped library and good science laboratories. The tireless efforts of the respected Principal and the entire staff and the school's commitment to extracurricular activities provide students with numerous opportunities to learn and grow... We wish our children a bright future under the tutelage of such a capable Principal and hardworking staff.

reviews.author: Arun Bhatt
reviews.review_body:
One of the most prestigious schools in Delhi. Highly well-known for the different style of teaching.
Heading back to school can be equal parts exciting and stressful for students, teachers, and parents alike. Sometimes we all need just us put a simple conversation to our son certainly help.

reviews.author: Simranjot Singh
reviews.review_body: Well located, easily accessible, tidy surroundings and well reputed.  One of the prestigious and old schools in Delhi

reviews.author: Umashankar umesh Dobhal
reviews.review_body: बेसिक शिक्षा के क्षेत्र में उत्कृष्ट प्रदर्शन किया है !

reviews.author: Dr.Z.V. Anwer
reviews.review_body:
Sardar Patel Vidyalaya (SPV) is a prestigious educational institution located in Lodi Estate, New Delhi, India. It is a co-educational day school known for its academic excellence and holistic approach to education.

Founded in 1958, Sardar Patel Vidyalaya follows the Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) curriculum and offers education from pre-primary to senior secondary levels. The school aims to provide a well-rounded education that nurtures the intellectual, social, emotional, and physical development of its students.

The infrastructure of Sardar Patel Vidyalaya includes well-equipped classrooms, science and computer labs, libraries, sports facilities, auditoriums, and spaces for extracurricular activities. The school provides a wide range of academic and co-curricular opportunities, allowing students to explore their interests and talents.

Sardar Patel Vidyalaya emphasizes the importance of character development, values, and ethical behavior. The school promotes a culture of inclusivity, respect, and community engagement. It encourages students to participate in activities that foster teamwork, leadership skills, and social responsibility.

The faculty at Sardar Patel Vidyalaya comprises highly qualified and dedicated teachers who strive to create a stimulating and supportive learning environment. They employ innovative teaching methodologies and focus on individual attention to ensure the academic progress and overall growth of each student.
